name: AI-Wrapper / Chat-First Onboarding
definition_origin: Category emerged 2023-2025 with the explosion of GPT-4 / Claude / Gemini API-wrapped consumer apps: ChatGPT mobile (2023), Cal AI (2024 — questionnaire wrapper around GPT for nutrition), Prayer Lock (Mau Baron, 2024 — wrapper for personalized prayers), Character.AI (2022, role-play chat), Replika, Pi (Inflection, 2023 — acquired by Microsoft 2024), Perplexity (2022, search wrapper), Suno / Udio (music gen wrappers), HeyGen / Runway (video gen wrappers). Codified by Adam Lyttle's onboarding teardowns (infocaptor.com), Mau Baron's Starter Story playbook, RevenueCat State of Subs 2025 'AI Apps' segment data (defined as apps where >70% of value is AI-generated). Cross-references heavily with .agent/research/emotional-design/results/AI_Slop_Tells.json (this category has the HIGHEST AI-slop risk because both the product AND the codegen producing it tend toward the same defaults — purple-blue gradient, Inter, indigo-500, Lucide cube/check/lightning, ✨🚀⚡ emoji headers). Distinct from Cal-AI (wrapped questionnaire) and Mau-Baron (wrapped story-onboarding) sub-patterns within the category.
core_mechanism: AI-wrapper onboarding works when the FIRST AI INTERACTION is the magic-moment aha — the user types one message, the AI responds with something they couldn't get elsewhere, and the value is undeniable in <60 seconds. Unlike wellness (long sunk-cost) or productivity (frictionless workspace), AI-wrapper relies on demonstrated capability — the chat IS the demo, and the demo IS the conversion event. Five reinforcing mechanisms: (1) Capability-as-proof — user prompts something that exposes GPT-4's capability vs whatever they'd get from base ChatGPT (specialized prompt engineering, fine-tuning, RAG, agentic loops). (2) Conversation-first chrome — most successful AI-wrappers (Pi, Perplexity, ChatGPT mobile, Character.AI) drop the user into the conversation surface within 1-2 onboarding screens. (3) Story-onboarding doctrine ALSO works (Mau Baron Prayer Lock, Cal AI) when the AI capability needs framing — the questionnaire/story IS the prompt-engineering surface. (4) RevenueCat 2025: AI-wrapper trial conversion 5.31% (vs 10.92% cross-category — LOWER) but +14% direct purchase rate. Why: AI capability is binary — users either see the magic or they don't, less middle-ground than wellness. (5) Anti-AI-slop discipline is non-negotiable — because the codegen producing the app trends toward purple-blue + indigo-500 + Inter slop, and consumers have learned to associate this aesthetic with low-effort AI-wrappers, breaking the visual default is the single highest-leverage onboarding optimization.
neuroscience_correlate: Surprise-driven dopamine release (VTA → nucleus accumbens, Schultz 2016) when AI response exceeds the user's prior model of what the app could do. Mere-exposure-effect inversion (Zajonc 1968 → habituation) when AI-wrapper visual aesthetic matches the saturated 'AI-slop' default — users' brains pattern-match to 'low-effort' and trust calibration drops. Self-reference effect (medial PFC, Kelley 2002) activates when the AI references user's input — the cross-step stitching mechanic (item 14) is load-bearing here.
empirical_evidence: RevenueCat State of Subs 2025/2026 'AI Apps' segment: trial conversion 5.31% (vs 10.92% cross-category median); +14% direct-purchase rate vs trial-then-paid funnels (consumers purchase outright when AI capability is undeniable, skip the trial-evaluate-decide loop). Cal AI: $30M ARR Y1 from a single solo-dev AI wrapper (Henry Langmack/Zach Yadegari) using long-questionnaire variant (item 17). Prayer Lock: $40K → $150K/mo within 12 months on story-onboarding variant (item 18, Mau Baron). Adam Lyttle teardowns (2024-2025): cinematic 4-screen pattern (item 25) wins for capability-undeniable AI apps (text-to-video, photo-magic) — Welcome / Social Proof / Core Demo / Paywall. ChatGPT mobile onboarding: zero-questionnaire, drop-into-conversation within 1 screen, hit 100M+ MAU within 9 months (Sensor Tower 2024). Perplexity: 1-screen welcome → conversation surface; 30M+ MAU 2024. Character.AI: 4-screen welcome → character browse → first-chat; 200M+ messages/day 2024. Pi (Inflection): conversation-first immediately on launch; user retention metrics not public but acquisition by Microsoft signals product strength. Suno: 2-screen welcome → first prompt → audio generation as aha. AI-Slop conversion penalty: 925studios audit 2026 reports AI-styled-as-AI-slop landing pages convert 91% lower than distinctive custom AI-wrapper sites (cross-reference AI_Slop_Tells.json — applied to AI-wrapper category specifically, the penalty compounds because consumers already discount AI-wrapper apps).
measurable_outcome_metric: Time-to-first-magic-moment (target <60 seconds — first prompt → AI response satisfies). First-prompt completion rate (% who type a first message — should be 80%+ if drop-into-conversation pattern). Magic-moment satisfaction proxy (% who type a SECOND prompt — engagement signal). Trial-conversion (5.31% benchmark; below = misaligned UX or weak capability). Direct-purchase conversion (+14% AI-wrapper benefit). D7 retention (AI-wrapper category low — typical ~12-18%, high churn). LTV (lower than wellness but capability-undeniable apps reach $40-80 LTV).
conversion_lift_benchmark: RevenueCat 2025: AI-Apps trial conversion 5.31% (vs 10.92% cross-category) — LOWER baseline; +14% direct-purchase lift compensates partially. Mau Baron Prayer Lock 5→15min story extension: 3× organic conversion. Cal AI 33-step questionnaire: $30M ARR Y1 single app. ChatGPT mobile zero-onboarding: 100M+ MAU in 9 months. AI-slop visual default penalty: ~91% conversion deficit vs distinctive custom (925studios 2026 cohort, cross-applied). Anti-slop discipline alone is the highest-leverage AI-wrapper onboarding optimization.
engineering_tactics: DECISION TREE: (1) If AI capability is UNDENIABLE on first interaction (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Character.AI, Suno) → drop-into-conversation pattern within 1-2 screens. (2) If AI capability needs FRAMING (Cal AI nutrition, Prayer Lock prayer, AI-coaching apps) → use story-onboarding (item 18) or long questionnaire (item 17). (3) If AI capability is VIDEO/IMAGE/AUDIO GEN (Suno, HeyGen, Runway) → use cinematic 4-screen pattern (item 25). DEFAULT PATTERN PER SUB-TYPE: Drop-into-conversation: 1-screen welcome → optional onboarding question ('What do you want to chat about?') → conversation surface immediately. Drop-into-conversation FSM: minimal (auth + welcome + chat). Story-wrapped (Mau Baron): 5-act structure (item 18). Questionnaire-wrapped (Cal AI): 25-33 steps (item 17). Cinematic (Adam Lyttle): 4 fullscreen screens (item 25). ALL VARIANTS share: ANTI-AI-SLOP DISCIPLINE (non-negotiable). Forbidden defaults: Inter font, indigo-500/violet-500/purple-blue gradients (#7C3AED → #3B82F6, #8B5CF6, #6366F1), the Lucide cube/check/lightning trinity, ✨🚀⚡🔥💡🎯 emoji bullets, three-column feature grid, max-w-7xl wrapper, rounded-xl on every card, ring-1 ring-white/10 cards, hover:scale-105, animate-pulse, 'AI-powered ✨' header copy, gradient mesh hero illustrations, isometric 3D voxel illustrations. Required alternatives: Cabinet Grotesk + Söhne (or Migra + Inter Tight, Space Grotesk + Söhne Mono — but customize metrics), brand colors defined in OKLCH (NOT Tailwind defaults), asymmetric layouts, varied border-radius scale (4-28px intentional diversity), custom illustration set OR thoughtfully-named non-trinity icons, single brand accent NOT gradient, editorial typography. Specific to chat-first: streaming-text response with character-by-character render (cursor blinking), proper code-block + markdown rendering, support for retry/regenerate, conversation-history persistence, input field auto-resize. Latency: AI response in <2s for short prompts, streaming start in <500ms. Cache: cache common prompts; pre-warm model. Offline-fallback: graceful degradation on network failure. Magic-link auth (item 60) is dominant default. Forbid: 33-step questionnaire for capability-undeniable AI apps (over-corrects from Cal-AI doctrine); story-onboarding for utility AI apps (gimmicky); cinematic 4-screen for chat-first (skip the marketing).
real_world_examples: (1) ChatGPT mobile: 1-screen welcome ('Talk to ChatGPT') → optional Sign in with Apple/Google → drop-into-conversation surface. NO questionnaire. NO theatrical loader. NO paywall at onboarding (paywall is feature-gated for GPT-4 + advanced features). (2) Perplexity: welcome → conversation surface within 2 screens. Onboarding teaches via example queries on the home screen. (3) Character.AI: welcome → 'Browse characters' surface → first-chat. Onboarding scoped to character-discovery, NOT data-collection. (4) Cal AI (Henry Langmack/Zach Yadegari): 33-step questionnaire wrapping GPT-4o macro-calculation — see item 17. Inverts the chat-first doctrine because nutrition needs framing. (5) Prayer Lock (Mau Baron): 5-act story-onboarding wrapping AI-prayer generation — see item 18. (6) Pi (Inflection): conversation-first; onboarding teaches the 'patient/wise companion' character through Pi's first messages. (7) Suno: 2-screen welcome → 'Describe a song' prompt → audio generation as immediate aha. (8) HeyGen: cinematic 4-screen (Welcome / Social Proof / Avatar Demo / Paywall). (9) Replika: 4-screen welcome → AI companion creation (gender, name, personality) → first-chat. Hybrid story+chat pattern. (10) Linktree-AI / form-builder AIs: minimal onboarding with prompt-as-spec input. (11) Lex AI (writing): prompt-driven first-document generation. (12) Notion AI is NOT in this category (productivity SaaS with AI features, not AI-wrapper-as-product).
mobile_vs_web_diffs: Both mobile AND web are first-class for AI-wrappers. Mobile: thumb-zone keyboard for chat input, push notifications for response-when-ready, voice input integration. Web: keyboard shortcuts (cmd+enter to send), multi-tab conversation comparison. Most successful AI-wrappers ship both (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Character.AI). Streaming response render is identical pattern web/mobile. Magic-link auth (item 60) works seamlessly on both. Mobile-specific: deep-link from email magic-link must drop user back into conversation, not to home screen. Web-specific: auto-scroll to bottom of conversation, copy-to-clipboard on response.
platform_design_language_alignment: FIGHTS HARD against both Liquid Glass (iOS 26+) and M3 Expressive (Android 16+) when the AI-wrapper defaults to AI-slop aesthetic (purple-blue gradient, Inter, indigo-500). To align: Liquid Glass translucent material works well for chat surface (input bar floating over content) when paired with custom typography (Söhne, Cabinet Grotesk) and brand-specific color (NOT indigo-500). M3E expressive shape system works for cinematic 4-screen variants. The DOMINANT design problem in this category is that Liquid Glass / M3E themselves don't prevent AI-slop — using a Liquid Glass material on top of an Inter+indigo-500+purple-blue-gradient chat surface produces a particularly egregious slop signature. The fix is COMBINED: native platform DL + anti-slop typography/color/icon discipline.
category_fit: Strongest fit: ChatBot wrappers (ChatGPT, Claude, Pi, Perplexity, Character.AI), specialized AI-coach wrappers (Cal AI, Prayer Lock, Replika, Wysa), media-gen wrappers (Suno, Udio, HeyGen, Runway, Krea, Magnific, Photo AI apps), agentic AI (Devin, OpenDevin wrappers, AutoGPT-derivatives), AI-search (Perplexity, You.com, Andi), writing AI (Lex, Sudowrite, Anthropic Claude.ai), translation AI (DeepL, ElevenLabs voice, HeyGen avatar). EXCLUSIONS: AI-FEATURED productivity SaaS (Notion AI, Linear AI, Cursor, Copilot) is productivity-onboarding doctrine (item 55), NOT AI-wrapper. AI-wrapper-of-medical-app is wellness doctrine (item 54). AI-wrapper for fintech is fintech doctrine (item 56) — KYC requirements override drop-into-conversation pattern.
solo_dev_feasibility: 1_week for drop-into-conversation pattern (auth + chat surface + API call to OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini). 1_month for Cal-AI-style questionnaire wrapper. 1_month for Mau-Baron-style story wrapper. AI-wrapper IS the most solo-dev-friendly category in 2024-2026 because: (a) infrastructure is API-call-only (no servers, no DB beyond conversation history), (b) value-prop is magic-moment-driven (no months of feature parity), (c) distribution via TikTok/Reddit/X spread fast for capability-demonstrable apps. Cal AI was solo-built. Prayer Lock was solo-built. Most $30K-$150K/mo solo-AI-wrappers in 2024-2025 ship in 4-12 weeks total.
tooling_options: Auth: Clerk (best DX), Supabase Auth, Stytch, Magic.link, Auth0. AI APIs: OpenAI (GPT-4o, GPT-4-Turbo, o1), Anthropic (Claude Sonnet 4.5, 4.7 1M context), Google (Gemini 1.5/2.0), Mistral, Cohere; Replicate / Modal / Together for hosted open-source models. Streaming: Vercel AI SDK (web + RN), Anthropic SDK streaming, OpenAI SDK streaming. Conversation persistence: Supabase, Convex, Firebase. Paywall: RevenueCat (most common), Adapty, Superwall. Variant routing: Plotline, Superwall. Analytics: PostHog (event-stream + feature flags), Mixpanel, Amplitude. Server-driven UI: rare in AI-wrappers; ship-fast tradition. Anti-slop typography: typotheque.com (Söhne licenses), Cabinet Grotesk (Indian Type Foundry), Migra (PangramPangram), Space Grotesk (Florian Karsten — open source). OKLCH color tooling: oklch.com, evilmartians/oklch-picker.
ai_dependency: REQUIRED — the category is defined by AI dependency. Use frontier-class models (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5+, Gemini 1.5 Pro+) for capability-defining responses; small models acceptable for routing/classification. Streaming response is non-negotiable for chat-first (perceived latency). Cost: $0.10-2.00 per active user per day depending on prompt length and conversation depth — major cost line item. Latency budget: <2s for short prompts, <500ms streaming start. Offline fallback: cached pre-generated responses for common queries; explicit 'offline' mode messaging.
claude_design_application: Prompt fragment: 'Build an AI-wrapper onboarding for [product]. STEP 1: Determine variant — drop-into-conversation (capability-undeniable apps like ChatGPT, Perplexity), story-onboarding (capability-needs-framing like Prayer Lock), questionnaire-wrapped (Cal AI nutrition style), or cinematic 4-screen (media-gen like Suno/HeyGen). STEP 2: Implement drop-into-conversation default if capability-undeniable — 1-screen welcome (Sage register, NOT "Welcome to your AI journey ✨"), Sign in with Apple / Google / magic link, drop into conversation surface in <60 seconds. STEP 3: Anti-AI-slop discipline (NON-NEGOTIABLE in this category): FORBID Inter font (use Cabinet Grotesk + Söhne, or Migra + Inter Tight, customized), FORBID indigo-500 / violet-500 / purple-blue gradients (#6366F1, #8B5CF6, #7C3AED → #3B82F6) — define brand color in OKLCH instead (e.g., oklch(0.68 0.18 35) ember-orange or oklch(0.55 0.12 145) moss-green), FORBID Lucide Box/CheckCircle/Zap icon trinity, FORBID ✨🚀⚡🔥💡🎯 emoji bullets in headers, FORBID three-column feature grid, FORBID max-w-7xl wrapper, FORBID rounded-xl on every card, FORBID ring-1 ring-white/10 cards, FORBID hover:scale-105, FORBID animate-pulse skeleton, FORBID gradient-mesh hero illustrations, FORBID isometric 3D voxel illustrations. Use asymmetric layouts (60/40 hero), varied border-radius (4-28px intentional diversity), custom illustrations or thoughtfully-named non-trinity icons (Phosphor or Lucide carefully selected), single brand accent NOT gradient, editorial typography (varied weights/sizes/asymmetric leading). STEP 4: Streaming AI response — cursor blink, character-by-character render, markdown rendering, code-block syntax highlighting. Vercel AI SDK or Anthropic SDK streaming. STEP 5: Auth via magic link (item 60) or Sign in with Apple. Forbid password as default. STEP 6: Paywall feature-gated (NOT at onboarding) for chat-first. For story/questionnaire variants, see items 17, 18.' Second fragment: 'Build the chat surface — input field auto-resize, send button transitions to stop button during streaming, retry/regenerate button on every assistant response, conversation history persisted in Supabase. Streaming render uses cursor-blink character-by-character. Background: solid bone #F4EFE6 (or ink #1A1816 for dark mode), NOT gradient mesh. Brand accent ember-orange #E36B2C used sparingly (active states only).'
stitch_application: Prompt fragment: 'Mockup an AI-wrapper drop-into-conversation onboarding. Screen 1 WELCOME — single-screen value-prop "Talk to [Brand]" 56pt Cabinet Grotesk weight 400, ink #1A1816 on bone #F4EFE6. Subhead 18pt Söhne "[capability promise]". Single CTA "Get started" — solid button, no gradient, no hover-scale. NO 3D blob illustration, NO gradient-mesh hero, NO purple-blue gradient anywhere, NO Inter font, NO indigo-500, NO emoji. Screen 2 AUTH — Sign in with Apple (top), Google (second), "Use email" text-link below. Or magic-link single-input. Screen 3 CONVERSATION — drop-in immediately. Top: hairline border with brand mark + chat title. Center: empty conversation surface with subtle placeholder text "Type to start...". Bottom: input field with send button (solid ember-orange #E36B2C, NOT gradient). Once user types and AI responds, render streaming character-by-character with blinking cursor. AI message background: subtle warm-grey card with ember-orange left-border accent (NOT a generic chat bubble with rounded-xl). User message: solid ink-color background with bone-color text. Forbid: ✨🚀 emoji decorations, indigo accent on input field, rounded-xl on every message, gradient-mesh background, Inter font, max-w-7xl wrapper, three-column feature grid, generic Lucide icon trinity, hover:scale-105 on send button. Aesthetic: feels like a niche Berlin design studio''s product, NOT a Vercel template, NOT a Lovable.dev clone.'
ai_codegen_failure_mode: AI-WRAPPER IS THE HIGHEST-RISK SLOP CATEGORY. Codegen tools (v0, Cursor, Lovable, Bolt, Claude Code) defaults produce: (1) Inter font on chat surface (the slop tell), (2) bg-gradient-to-r from-violet-500 to-indigo-500 on hero or send-button (peak slop), (3) ✨ emoji on the AI mascot avatar, (4) 'AI-Powered' or '✨ AI' badge in header, (5) three-column feature grid on welcome screen ('Smart ✨', 'Fast ⚡', 'Secure 🔒'), (6) Lucide MessageCircle + Sparkles + Bot icon trinity, (7) hover:scale-105 on send button, (8) rounded-xl on every chat message bubble, (9) ring-1 ring-white/10 on AI message cards, (10) animate-pulse on loading state, (11) gradient-mesh hero illustration, (12) max-w-7xl wrapper. Result: app indistinguishable from 1000 other AI-wrappers, conversion penalty applies. Counter-prompt: 'Build an AI-wrapper with EXPLICIT ANTI-SLOP DISCIPLINE. FORBIDDEN: Inter font, indigo-500/violet-500/purple-blue gradients, ✨🚀⚡🔥💡🎯 emoji in headers/bullets, MessageCircle+Sparkles+Bot icon trinity, three-column feature grid, max-w-7xl wrapper, rounded-xl on every component, ring-1 ring-white/10, hover:scale-105, animate-pulse, gradient-mesh hero, isometric 3D illustration, the word "powered by AI" anywhere visible. REQUIRED: Cabinet Grotesk + Söhne typography (or Migra + Inter Tight customized), brand color defined in OKLCH (custom palette, NOT Tailwind defaults), asymmetric hero layout (60/40), varied border-radius scale (4px inputs, 10px buttons, 18px cards, 28px hero), single brand accent (NOT gradient), editorial typography (varied weights), drop-into-conversation pattern within 60 seconds. Cite the AI_Slop_Tells.json discipline; treat it as load-bearing.'
anti_patterns: (1) AI-slop visual default — Inter + indigo-500 + purple-blue gradient + Lucide trinity + emoji bullets — visible-AI-slop signature drives 91% conversion penalty (925studios 2026). (2) 33-step questionnaire on capability-undeniable AI app (over-corrects from Cal-AI). (3) Story-onboarding doctrine on utility chat-first (gimmicky). (4) Theatrical AI-reveal at climax for chat-first (the chat IS the reveal). (5) Paywall at onboarding for chat-first apps (ChatGPT/Claude don't paywall onboarding; trial conversion penalty applies; feature-gate instead). (6) 'AI-Powered ✨' badge as hero copy (low-effort signal). (7) Generic 'Build apps faster ✨' Lovable-clone copy. (8) Three-column feature grid with Smart/Fast/Secure framing. (9) Generic Bot avatar (sparkles + cube hybrid). (10) Streaming-render skipped (perceived-latency disaster). (11) 'How does it work?' section before 'Talk to AI' on hero (delays magic-moment). (12) Voice register mismatch — Sage on Pi-style companion, Caregiver on Perplexity-style search.
regulatory_risk: Medium-High. (a) GDPR — AI-wrappers collect chat input as personal data; AI processing as automated decision-making (Article 22) requires opt-out for significant decisions. (b) EU AI Act (effective Feb 2025; full provisions 2026): generative-AI watermarking obligations, transparency requirements, foundation-model providers' obligations cascade to wrappers. (c) COPPA — chat with AI by under-13 triggers VPC; persistent IDs disclosure. (d) FTC enforcement on AI deceptive claims (FTC AI Comply 2024-2025 sweeping enforcement). (e) Copyright — output of AI generation may infringe (Suno/Udio RIAA lawsuits 2024-2025). (f) Defamation/safety — Character.AI subject of multiple lawsuits 2024-2025 over user safety. (g) Data privacy — chat input often used for model training without proper consent (Italian DPA blocked ChatGPT briefly 2023). (h) FTC Click-to-Cancel applies to AI-wrapper subscriptions. (i) State-level AI laws (CA AI safety bill SB-1047 vetoed but expected to return; UT AI consumer disclosure 2024).
platform_constraints_2026: Apple Guideline 4.7 — generative AI must not produce illegal/harmful content, age-gate appropriately. Apple Guideline 5.1.2 — AI must not impersonate real persons without consent. Apple Guideline 1.1 — child safety in AI chat. App Store specifically reviews AI-wrappers for content moderation (Character.AI, Replika scrutiny). Google Play Generative AI Policy (effective 2024) — pre-flight content moderation, model card transparency, NSFW restrictions. ATT applies. Apple Foundation Models framework (iOS 26+ on-device LLM) — alternative to cloud API for privacy-sensitive variants. Apple Intelligence integration for iOS 26+ — opt-in framework. Apple Guideline 3.1.2 — subscription disclosure including AI-credit consumption disclosure (token-pricing wrappers must be transparent).
accessibility_implications: WCAG 2.2 — chat surface must be screen-reader accessible (live-region announcements for streaming AI responses). Streaming response cursor must respect prefers-reduced-motion (replace blink with static cursor). Touch target 24×24 px (SC 2.5.8) for send/retry/regenerate buttons. Color contrast 4.5:1 (SC 1.4.3) — common failure: low-contrast secondary text in AI message bubbles. Voice input/output for users who can't type — many AI-wrappers skip this (regression). Streaming response audio (text-to-speech) for visually-impaired users. Code-block keyboard navigation. Alt-text for AI-generated images. EU EAA 2025 enforcement applies. Animation (SC 2.3.3) — fade-in on every AI response violates if not reducible.
pitfalls_caveats: (1) AI-slop visual default is the #1 risk — codegen produces it by default; explicit ban list and named alternatives required. (2) Streaming response is non-negotiable; static-render is perceived as broken (latency-sensitive context). (3) Cost at scale ($0.10-2.00 per active user per day for chat depth) — must monitor token usage per user, gate heavy users to paid tier. (4) Hallucination risk — AI-wrappers in regulated categories (medical, legal, financial) face liability; add disclaimers. (5) Model deprecation — OpenAI/Anthropic deprecate models on 12-month cycles; refactor planning required. (6) Latency on mobile networks — streaming start <500ms is hard on 3G. (7) Conversation persistence cost (vector DBs, embeddings) adds infrastructure complexity. (8) Apple/Google review delays for new AI-wrappers (2024-2025 review took 1-2 weeks for content-moderation review). (9) Replika lawsuit + Character.AI suicide lawsuit (2024-2025) — child safety + emotional dependency liability. (10) Token-pricing transparency required (App Store + state laws). (11) Trial conversion lower than wellness (5.31% vs 10.92%) — must compensate via direct-purchase + retention; trial-heavy strategy fails.
cross_cultural_validity: AI-wrapper category is global but localization deeper than translation. JP: ChatGPT JP variant tests politer register; AI roleplay (Replika, Character.AI) high-engagement. KR: AI-companion apps high-traction. CN: domestic AI-wrappers (Doubao by ByteDance, Wenxin Yiyan by Baidu, Kimi Chat by Moonshot) dominate; foreign AI-wrappers blocked. MENA: Arabic-language AI lags English by ~6 months — Arabic-first AI-wrappers (Falcon-based) emerging. LATAM: Portuguese/Spanish AI-wrappers underserved opportunity. India: Hindi/Tamil AI emerging; English dominant in middle-class market. Anti-slop typography needs script-coverage check (Cabinet Grotesk has limited Cyrillic, no Arabic/CJK; pick a typeface with the script you need — IBM Plex covers more, Söhne has limited script coverage).
prescribed_action: DECISION TREE: (1) If capability-undeniable on first interaction → DROP-INTO-CONVERSATION pattern within 1-2 screens (ChatGPT/Perplexity/Pi pattern). (2) If capability-needs-framing → STORY-ONBOARDING (item 18, Mau Baron) or QUESTIONNAIRE-WRAPPED (item 17, Cal AI). (3) If media-gen with cinematic capability → CINEMATIC 4-SCREEN (item 25, Adam Lyttle). NON-NEGOTIABLE ANTI-AI-SLOP DISCIPLINE: Forbid Inter, indigo-500, violet-500, purple-blue gradients (#6366F1, #8B5CF6, #7C3AED → #3B82F6), Lucide cube/check/lightning trinity, ✨🚀⚡🔥💡🎯 emoji bullets, three-column feature grid, max-w-7xl wrapper, rounded-xl on every card, ring-1 ring-white/10, hover:scale-105, gradient-mesh hero, isometric 3D voxel, 'AI-Powered ✨' badge copy. Prescribe instead: Cabinet Grotesk + Söhne (or Migra + Inter Tight), OKLCH brand colors (NOT Tailwind defaults), asymmetric layouts, varied border-radius, custom illustrations, single brand accent (NOT gradient), editorial typography. Streaming response (Vercel AI SDK or Anthropic streaming) with cursor-blink character-by-character render. Magic-link auth (item 60) default; Sign in with Apple/Google secondary. Paywall feature-gated for chat-first (NOT at onboarding); paywall at climax for story/questionnaire variants only. Trial conversion benchmark 5.31% (lower than category mean) — compensate via direct-purchase. Cross-reference AI_Slop_Tells.json as load-bearing discipline.
questionnaire_relevance: Drop-into-conversation: NO questionnaire (forbidden). Story-wrapped: identity questions only (item 27, Mau Baron). Questionnaire-wrapped: see item 17 (Cal AI). Cinematic 4-screen: NO questionnaire. The single most common AI-wrapper mistake is over-applying questionnaire doctrine to capability-undeniable apps.
aha_relevance: Aha = first AI response that exceeds the user's prior model of capability. Time-to-aha <60 seconds (drop-into-conversation), 5-15 minutes (story-wrapped), 8-15 minutes (questionnaire-wrapped). The chat IS the demo IS the aha for capability-undeniable variants — no theatrical loader needed. Cross-step stitching (item 14) load-bearing in story/questionnaire variants — AI response must reference prior inputs.
telemetry_events: onboarding_step_viewed, onboarding_step_completed, conversation_started, first_prompt_typed, first_ai_response_received, first_ai_response_satisfaction_inferred (second_prompt_typed_within_30s), streaming_started, streaming_completed, streaming_failed, conversation_persisted, paywall_feature_gate_triggered, trial_started, direct_purchase, conversation_depth_metric (turns per session). Cost-tracking events: tokens_consumed_per_session, model_used, cost_per_user_per_day. AI-slop audit events: anti_slop_lint_passed (build-time check on banned classes/colors).
measurement_horizon: Day 0 (first-prompt completion + magic-moment satisfaction); Day 7 (return-rate — AI-wrapper churn high, ~12-18% D7); Day 30 (trial-conversion or direct-purchase realization); 12-month LTV ($40-80 typical, capability-undeniable apps reach higher).
emotional_archetype_alignment: PRIMARY: Magician (transformation, AI as the spell — Cal AI, Prayer Lock, Suno), Sage (wisdom-companion — Pi, Perplexity, Claude.ai). SECONDARY: Creator (media-gen — HeyGen, Runway, Suno), Hero (capability-empowering — ChatGPT for productivity), Caregiver (AI-companion-of-care — Wysa, Replika in mental-health framing). MISMATCHES: Outlaw (rebellion + AI = Replika 2024 controversy; high-risk in 2025-2026 regulatory environment), Jester (humor in AI undermines trust on capability claims). Critical: archetype voice MUST be expressed in copy without using AI-slop visual defaults — the ban list (Inter, indigo-500, gradient, emoji, Lucide trinity) is independent of archetype.
anti_pattern_paired: Pairs against AI-slop visual default (cross-reference AI_Slop_Tells.json — load-bearing discipline). Pairs against Long Questionnaire / Sunk-Cost Pattern when applied to capability-undeniable AI (over-corrects). Pairs against Wasted Loading Screens (streaming response replaces theatrical loader for chat-first). Pairs against Premature Authentication (magic-link defers password requirement; biometric gate for repeat sessions). Pairs against Wall-of-Text + Cognitive Overload, Generic Celebration, Toggle Paywall.
sources: [RevenueCat State of Subscription Apps 2025/2026 — AI Apps Segment](https://www.revenuecat.com/state-of-subscription-apps/)
[Mau Baron Prayer Lock Playbook — Starter Story](https://www.starterstory.com/mou)
[Apple Generative AI App Store Review Guidelines (4.7)](https://developer.apple.com/app-store/review/guidelines/)
